title: PDF Viewer duplicate sheets + grey borders fix
description:
PDF Viewer no longer shows duplicate sheets or zoomed-in half-page copies. Viewer workspaces were built with the map board's 5× footprint multiplier, making display boxes much larger than the PDF — that looked like a zoomed duplicate next to a full sheet. Duplicate storageKeys are now deduped on load.

Grey borders around the viewer stack are removed: white background, zero bounds padding, left-aligned pages (no side gutters).

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg58).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Fix viewer duplicate/zoomed sheets (footprint mul only on map, dedupe by storageKey).
Repair viewer page dimensions to intrinsic PDF size on layout normalize.
Remove grey viewer borders (white background, zero pad, left align).
